items.name: The Morning Kettle
items.description: For the first cup of tea in our new kitchen, quiet and gilded and ours.

items.name: Espresso Set
items.description: Italian made, with brass trim. The Saturday morning ritual.

items.name: Ivory Dinnerware
items.description: Twelve settings of bone china with a gilt rim, painted by hand.

items.name: Linen Bedding
items.description: Soft Portuguese linen for slow Sunday mornings.

items.name: The Reading Armchair
items.description: Deep emerald velvet, the corner where our evenings will go.

items.name: Persian Rug
items.description: A runner knotted by hand to warm the hallway between us.

items.name: The Washing Machine
items.description: Quiet, efficient, blessedly boring. A truly grown gift.

items.name: Steam Press
items.description: Crisp shirts on Sunday nights for the week ahead.
